events.label: Catalina West End
events.description: Topaz rounds the Catalina West End mark to port and begins the backside reach along the island's south shore.

events.label: Gybe onto port
events.description: Topaz gybes onto port tack to square away for the downwind run along the south coast toward the east end.

events.label: Spinnaker douse
events.description: Wind shifts and lifts; Topaz douses the kite and hardens up on a reach for the final approach to the finish.
